sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17954" key="au)toswfrosu/nh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-σωφροσύνη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n17954.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">abstract moderation</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">temperance,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2317.tlg001:p.144A" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.144A.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
